responses.text: Prime Minister of Japan Yoshihide Suga decided to introduce the post of Minister to combat loneliness and isolation.

Instruct: I need a report on suicide rates in Japan during the COVID-19 pandemic.  This would include cases in which the pandemic is identified as a causal factor, but also other factors from that period even if not clearly associated with the pandemic.  I am not looking for information on suicide rates in Japan more generally, however, unless that is used as a basis for comparison with rates during the pandemic.
Query:Last year, the number of suicides in Japan rose for the first time in 11 years, to 21,077, 2.5 times the number of deaths from COVID-19.
Mental health needs are insufficient.
The epidemic has exacerbated women's worries about work, childcare, care and domestic violence, according to the Ministry of Health, Labor and Welfare.
The number of people who choose to commit suicide in Japan has risen to 2,199 in October 2020 alone.

About 40% of suicide prevention organizations in Japan have temporarily closed or reduced their working hours due to the epidemic

Depression has also increased in the pandemic in Japan.
The Japanese government announced the establishment of the “Solitude and Isolation Response Chamber” with Sakamoto Tetsuji as minister to address the issue of loneliness.
The number of suicides under the age of 20 was 659, an increase of 10.0% year-on-year, the highest since 2000.

Instruct: Cosmetic surgery is a major focus of medical tourism, and I need to learn more about that topic.  Please write me a report that describes the scale and impact of medical tourism for cosmetic surgery,  I am interested in both benefits and challenges, both for the individuals who travel for this reason and for the destinations to which they travel. I want to take a broad view of cosmetic surgery, including cosmetic dental surgery (e.g., implants).  Please also summarize available statistical information such as the most popular destinations for the most common types of cosmetic surgery, costs, and outcomes.
Query:Taiwan is the first choice for many overseas Chinese and foreign people to perform plastic and cosmetic surgery.

More and more foreigners are seeking medical treatment in Malaysia.

Theories of the impact of communication on the audience have made it clear to the media why, how and how much they can influence the minds of the audience.
Images of Turkish drones appear throughout the series.

The series advertises Turkey's efforts to build military hardware.

The Martian helicopter has faster rotation of propellers, design features that reduce blade runout, extremely low operating temperatures, and design that is resistant to radiation.
Pralay Gayen and colleagues created an installation for obtaining oxygen and hydrogen from a saline solution close in composition and temperature to that in Martian lakes.
Mars Rover Perseverance tested the technology of extracting oxygen from the Martian atmosphere using the instrument MOXIE.
The bacteria that release oxygen can grow freely in the soil and atmospheric conditions of Mars, simulated on Earth, and also be used as food for other life forms.
MOXIE can obtain up to 10 grams of oxygen per hour

Instruct: I am writing a report on how to create a sustainable atmosphere on Mars. My report should include the equipment needed to create the atmosphere, worst case scenarios we should plan for, and the largest number of people that could be sustained by the atmosphere. I am also interested in NASA’s oxygen-generating experiment on Mars. I plan to report on the experiment plan, the experiment itself, and the results of it. I will highlight the incorporation of local materials, if any, in the creation of the sustainable atmosphere.
Query:Future versions of the technology could work on Mars to produce breathable oxygen.
5 grams of oxygen would be enough for one astronaut to breathe for about 10 minutes
The Perseverance rover has a device for obtaining oxygen from the Martian atmosphere.

A team at Washington University in St. Louis has developed a new technology that uses electricity to break down salt water into oxygen and hydrogen, convert it into usable fuel and oxygen, and can operate in the minus 36 degrees Celsius Martian atmosphere.
The simple conversion of the system consisting of nano-wires and specific bacteria makes it possible to obtain an adequate amount of organic molecules and oxygen from sources on Mars.
The MOXIE tool is the size of a tester and exits carbon monoxide after producing oxygen from carbon dioxide.

Instruct: I am writing a report on how to create a sustainable atmosphere on Mars. Instruct: The purpose of my report is to give businesses an idea about the scale of potential harms a single product can result in and the cost for producers. My report needs to contain specific information about the claims from individuals and organizations in any country against Bayer in Roundup cases and about settlements with details of any financial figures like penalties, compensations, etc. 
Query:Analysts estimate that the settlement could eventually cost Bayer between $8 billion and $12 billion.

Bayer AG will announce that it has reached an approximately $10.5 billion agreement with plaintiffs in the United States who have accused its Roundup herbicide of causing cancer to settle tens of thousands of lawsuits.

Instruct: The purpose of my report is to give businesses an idea about the scale of potential harms a single product can result in and the cost for producers. Query:The company’s market value has evaporated by about $39 billion.
Bayer, the German chemical company, said on Wednesday that a legal dispute over cancer caused by its Roundup brand herbicide has reached a $2 billion settlement with regulators.
Bayer sales in the third quarter fell by 13.5% compared to the same period of 2019 - to $9.9 billion.
Bayer has been sued by 52,500 plaintiffs in the United States because the herbicide glyphosate is suspected to cause cancer.
Roundup is Monsanto’s flagship product, with global sales of $4.76 billion in 2015, of which $1.9 billion was for agricultural products, and glyphosate was the largest.
Bayer acquired 100% of Monsanto in 2018 for $63.5 billion, becoming the largest agricultural concern.
Bayer has settled 88,500 of 125,000 claims.

Thieves of a stolen painting by Gustav Klimt, which was recently discovered in the same Italian gallery where it was stolen after 22 years, have admitted to returning the artwork to the scene of the theft.

Instruct: I would like to write an article about the Gustav Klimt's painting, "Portrait of a Lady." I am primarily interested in details about how the painting was lost and where and how it was later recovered. I would also be interested in its valuation.
Query:The picture of the Austrian artist Gustav Klimt “Portrait of a woman ”, considered stolen since 1997, was found by workers in the wall of the gallery of modern art Ricci Oddi in Piacenza.
A gardener was cleaning the ivy of the museum’s outer wall when he found a metal plate on the wall, and when he opened it, he found a canvas painting in a black sackcloth bag.
French Culture Minister Rosine Bachelet said it was to return it to its rightful owners for the crimes they have suffered.

Italian prosecutor Ornella Chicca said the actual painting was verified as authentic, but it remains unclear whether the painting was later smuggled back into the wall mezzanine or was hidden there from the beginning, pending further examination and clarification.
The painting “Portrait of a woman ” by Gustav Klimt is worth 60 million euros.
The painting was painted by Klimt in 1916-1917.
Italian collector Giuseppe Ricci Oddi bought the painting in 1925 and kept it in the Audi Gallery of Modern Art of the same name until it was stolen on February 22, 1997.
Police believe the thieves used a device such as a fishing rod to remove the painting from the wall.
A gardener at the Ricci Oddi Modern Art Gallery in Piacenza, Italy, found a painting hiding in a plastic bag within an external wall while clearing away ivy in December.
This painting is one of the works that Klimt created in the last years of his life.
The painting features a special symbolic pattern.
An art student discovered that "Portrait of a Lady" had been painted on another painting by Gustav Klimt, "Portrait of a Young Lady", shortly before the painting was stolen.
Portrait of a Lady, a $500 million painting, was stolen from the Ricci Oddi Gallery of Modern Art on 22 February 1997.

Several asylum seekers believed to be Iranian nationals have been rescued by British forces in the English Channel in the past few months.
